reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래 노란색 이제품을 너~~~무 만족하면서 쓰고있었는데 오래써도 튼튼하고 고장없었는데 때가 많이 타서 한번 교체해볼까~하고 다른색상으로 구매해봤어요! 그사이에 줄에 물결무늬처럼 미끄럼방지하는 느낌의 특수처리가 되어 업그레이드 되었네요!! 비가오나 눈이오나 나가야하는 실외배변견인데 크로스 핸즈프리가 되면서 딱 길이가 적절하고 방수가 완벽하면서도 고리등등이 너무 튼튼한데 디자인이 너무 이쁘고 실용성이 있는 줄은 아무리 아무리 찾아봐도 정말 바잇미 이 제품 뿐입니다! 중형견이 쓰기에 아주 튼튼하고 줄길이도 어깨통한크로스로 맨다고 가정하면 (겨울에 패딩같은 두께감 있는 외투를 입고) 저랑 강아지 사이에 중간 부분 항상 가볍게 한번 잡아주고 다니다가 비상시에 컨트롤만 살짝 살짝해주고 풀이 넓은 곳에가서는 그냥 그 손만 놔주면 
비교적 자유롭게 활동하고 배변하기 아주 편리한 길이에요! 수많은핸즈즈프리 줄 다 구매해서 써봤는데 이거보다 더 짧으면(=2m) 어깨크로스로맸을때 짧아서 배변시 불편하고 또 이거보다 더 길면(3m) 너무길어서 중간을 잡고다녀도 유사시 땅에 끄여서 불편했어요 정말 완벽한 길이감이라고 생각합니다. 똥봉투 거는곳도 완벽한 곳에 있다고 생각해요! 주위에 강아지 키우는 분있으면 걍 아묻따 이 바잇미 리드줄이라고 생각해서 추천하고 싶어요. 정리하자면 최고장점 (어깨크로스 가능한 핸즈프리 길이감 아주 적절(허리크로스 줄도 다른제품 써봤으나 어깨크로스가 최고로 안전하고 편함) 아주 튼튼한 자재. 모든 부분의 방수감 완벽 으로 장점이 하나로 꼽을 수 없고 최소 이렇게 세가지입니다. 끝까지 단종없이 영원히 판매해주세요.. 😍
reviews.content_en: I was originally using the yellow version of this product and was SO satisfied with it - it stayed durable with no issues even after long use, but it got pretty stained so I thought I'd try switching colors! In the meantime, the leash got upgraded with a special wavy texture treatment on the cord that has a non-slip feel!! Whether it's raining or snowing, my outdoor pottying dog needs to go out, and with the cross hands-free design, the length is just right, the waterproofing is perfect, and the rings and everything are so sturdy, but I honestly can't find any other leash quite like this BITE ME product that has both such pretty design AND practical functionality! For a medium-sized dog, it's very sturdy, and if you assume wearing it as a cross over the shoulder (like wearing a puffy jacket with thickness in winter), I always lightly hold the middle part between my dog and me, then just give slight control adjustments in emergencies, and when we go to an open field I just let go of that hand - it's such a convenient length for relatively free movement and easy pottying! I've bought and tried tons of hands-free leashes, and anything shorter (=2m) feels too short when worn cross-shoulder for pottying, and anything longer (3m) is too long where even holding the middle part causes it to drag on the ground in emergencies. I really think the length is perfect. The poop bag holder is also in the perfect spot! Whenever I meet someone with a dog, I just confidently recommend this BITE ME leash without hesitation. To summarize, the best advantages are: (1) perfectly appropriate hands-free length for cross-shoulder wear - I've tried waist-cross leashes with other products too, but cross-shoulder is safest and most comfortable, (2) very sturdy material, (3) perfect waterproofing throughout all parts - the advantages can't be summed up in one point, at least these three. Please never discontinue this and sell it forever.. 😍

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
너무편하고 색상도 이뻐요 ㅎ 
특히워터프루프라서 샀어요 ㅎ 
바다나 계곡 비올때 목줄에 씻어도냄새나눈데 
편할꺼같고 신경안쓰고놀수도있을꺼같네요 ㅎ 
이번에 주문한거 너무다잘산것같아요 
귀여우면서고 예쁘네요
reviews.content_en: It's so convenient and the colors are pretty too ㅎ I especially bought it because it's waterproof ㅎ Even when washing the collar at the beach or in valleys during rain, there's no smell issue, so it'll be convenient and I can play without worrying ㅎ Everything I ordered this time seems like such a great purchase The design is cute and pretty!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
우선 색이 컬러풀해서 넘 이뻐요
촉감은 딱 실리콘재잘 느낌이구요 무게는 생각햇던것보다는 가벼운편이었어요 좀 많이 무거울줄 알았었는데 ㅎㅎ
그런데 목줄을 처음 써봐서 그런지 강아지다 엄청 불편해하고 저도 어색하네요ㅠ 하네스가 익숙해져서 오히려 목줄은 불편.. 괜히 목줄로샀다하고 살짝 후회중..
reviews.content_en: First of all, the colors are so colorful and pretty! The texture feels just like silicone material, and it's lighter than I expected - I thought it would be much heavier ㅎㅎ But since this is my first time using a collar, my dog finds it really uncomfortable and it feels awkward for me too ㅠ Since we're used to a harness, the collar actually feels inconvenient.. I'm kinda regretting getting a collar instead..

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
실외배변하는 애기라 비옷에 하네스는 준비 과정도 번거로우니깐 목줄 부터 샀어요
간편한 준비로 만족하고 리쉬도 구매했습니다
무게는 30그램 더 나가도 안전을 위해 m으로 구매 길이가 있다보니 무게가 좀 체감 되지만 전 만족해요
가격만 할인해쥬면 좋은데 ㅠㅠ 
배송은 지방으로 주문한 밤으로부터 다담날 오전 도착해서 낫베드
악세사리를 달다보니 엑쏘 하네스도 출시되면 좋겠네요
reviews.content_en: Since my pup goes outside for pottying, I bought a collar first because preparing a raincoat and harness is a hassle. I'm satisfied with the convenient prep and also purchased the leash. I would've gone with M size for safety even though it weighs 30g more - the weight is noticeable because of the length, but I'm satisfied. I wish you'd give a discount on the price though ㅠㅠ The shipping arrived the next morning after ordering from a provincial area so that was great. Since I'm attaching accessories, I hope you release an EXSO harness too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 예전에 산것도 튼튼하니 진짜 오래썼는데 새로나온건 손시린요즘 허리에 차고 산책하기 넘좋아요 길이도 적당하니 m사이즈 했는데 넘이쁘네요 이것도 오래오래 잘써볼께요 예전꺼랑 비교샷
reviews.content_en: The one I bought before was sturdy and I used it for a really long time, and the new one is great for winter when my hands get cold - wearing it around my waist while taking walks is so nice! The length is perfect so I got size M and it's so pretty! I'll use this one for a long time too. Here's a comparison shot with my old one

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 줄이 너무 보들보들해요~ 그래서 잘 늘어나면 어쩌나 했는데 그렇지도 않네요! 가볍구 아쥬 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en: The leash is so soft! I was worried it might stretch easily, but it doesn't! It's lightweight and really good!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
마카롱 리드줄을 쓰고 있어서 편리함을 경험했기에 하나 더 구매를 하였습니다 핸즈프리에 고탄력감 그리고 핸들링때 미끌림 없음이 큰장점입니다
전에꺼는 세탁을 하고 오늘은 새것 장착하고 산책갑니다
reviews.content_en: Since I've been using the Macaron leash and experienced how convenient it is, I bought one more. The hands-free design with high elasticity and no slippage when handling are major advantages. I'm going for a walk today with the new one after washing the old one.

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
워터프루프라 활동량 많은 우리 얘한테 딱일듯 해서 
구매했어요! 배색 컬러감에 반해서 다른 목줄은 눈도 안가더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋ 너무 귀엽고 이뻐용 , 버클도 체결소리가 딱 단단한게 풀릴위험 없이 잘 사용할것 같아요! 
핸즈프리라 편할것 같은데 우리 애는 천방지축이라 어깨에 걸었다간 제 앞니가 나갈것 같아요 ㅎㅎ ... 
무튼 너무 이쁜 목줄이라 주변 애견인한테 추천해쥬고싶어용
reviews.content_en: Since it's waterproof, it seemed perfect for our very active pup, so I bought it! I fell for the color combination and don't even look at other collars anymore ㅋㅋㅋ It's so cute and pretty! The buckle click sounds solid and secure - no risk of it coming undone. With the hands-free design I thought it would be super convenient, but my pup is such a wild child that if I put it over my shoulder, I feel like my front teeth might fall out ㅎㅎ Anyway, it's such a pretty leash that I want to recommend it to other dog owners around me!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
방수도 되고 허리에 매고다니니까 손도자유롭고 넘 좋습니다!
기존에 있는 목줄이랑 스트랩이 넘 길어서 가슴아래쯤에 매어도 162cm여자키에는 조금 땅에 끌렸는데 이건 길이가 딱 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
꼬미는 목둘레22cm라 s샀는데 잘 맞습니다
reviews.content_en: It's waterproof and wearing it around my waist leaves my hands free - it's so great! My existing collar and strap were so long that even when I wore it below my chest, it dragged on the ground a bit for someone who's 162cm, but this one has the perfect length ㅎㅎ My pup's neck circumference is 22cm so I got size S and it fits perfectly!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
넘 귀엽고 가벼워서 좋아요🩵
색깔도 시원상큼한 파랑이라
여름에 착용하기 넘 좋습니당💕
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and lightweight - I love it! 🩵 The color is a cool, refreshing blue, so it's perfect to wear in summer! 💕

reviews.name: 앵****
reviews.content:
작년부터 고민했는데 사길 잘한거 같아요 
몇주째 비가오니까 잘쓰고있고 오염이나 냄새 안나서 좋아요
튼튼한데 대신 무거운 편이고 버클이 큰편이라 그런지 끼울때 소리가 너무 커서 강아지가 경기해요;;;;
좀 크게해서 목에 씌워쓰고있어요ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: I've been thinking about it since last year and I'm so glad I bought it! It's been raining for a few weeks and I use it all the time. It's great that there's no dirt or smell 😊 It's sturdy but a bit heavy, and the buckle is pretty big so it makes a really loud sound when I clip it on, which makes my pup have a fit;;;; So I've been putting it on loose around his neck instead ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
너무너무 예뻤는데 이제 한 네번 썼나 목줄만 잃어버렸어요 ㅎ 
예뻐서 다시 구매할 거예요
근데 아쉬운 점은 계절을 잘못 선택한 것 같아요 핸즈프리라 요즘 같이 추운 날 주머니 손 넣고 쓰기 너무 좋긴한데 재질이 천이 아니고 차가워지는? 소재라 밖에서 만지고 싶지 않아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 여름에 살 걸 또 생각보다 먼지가 잘 붙어서 산책 다녀오고 물티슈로 슥 닦으면 때가 때가 엄청나요 
그래도 핸즈프리라는 점과 디자인에서 점수 다 드렸어요
reviews.content_en: It was so so pretty, but after using it just a few times I lost the leash 😅 It's so cute that I'm going to buy it again. But the downside is I think I picked the wrong season for it. Since it's hands-free it's super convenient to use on cold days like now with my hands in my pockets, but the material isn't fabric—it's that kind of material that gets cold, so I don't want to touch it outside 😂 I should've bought it for summer. Also, dust sticks to it really easily, so after a walk when I wipe it with a wet wipe, you can see how much dirt comes off! But I gave it full marks for the hands-free feature and the design

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
비오는날 나가서놀때 일반줄은 씻어도냄새가나고 
말려도안되고해서 편하게놀고싶어서 구매했는데 
색상도너무이쁘고 저희집 댕댕이랑 잘어울리는거같아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It rains so much and when we go out to play, regular leashes smell even after washing and don't dry well, so I bought this because I wanted to play more comfortably. The color is so pretty and it looks like it suits our pup really well 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
울집 닥스 둘!
리드줄이 오래되고 낡아서 불편 했는뎅
편해졌어요
색상이 새련되 보이고요^^
이뻐요 만족 합니다.
reviews.content_en: We have two dachshunds at home! Our old leash was worn out and inconvenient, but now it's so much better. The color looks really sleek too 😊 I'm happy with it!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
컬러도 이쁘고  디자인도 너~무 마음에 들어요
우리집 털복숭이  수영장갈때 최고예요
reviews.content_en: The color is pretty and I really love the design so much~ It's perfect when my fluffy goes to the pool!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
목둘레 26cm 잘맞아요! 
척찌거두 사러왔어어!!!넘조아어 튼튼
reviews.content_en: 26cm neck size fits perfectly! I came to buy another one!!! I love it so much - it's really sturdy

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
제주도에는 비가 자주오고 가끔 바다 수영도 자주해서 방수되는 목줄로 구매했어요! 근데 마음에 들긴하지만 제가 사용하기에는 끈이 많이길어요ㅜ
어깨에 크로스로 매도 살짝길어서 고민중이예요.
그거외에는 만족해요.
reviews.content_en: It rains a lot in Jeju and we swim in the ocean pretty often, so I bought a waterproof leash! I do like it, but the cord is a bit too long for me to use ㅜ Even when I wear it crosswise over my shoulder it's a little long, so I'm thinking about it. Other than that I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 방수재질이라서 너무 좋아요! 줄이 길어서 너무 편해요
reviews.content_en: I love it because it's waterproof material! And the cord is long so it's really convenient

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 가볍고 방수되고 색감도 너무 이쁘네요
reviews.content_en: It's lightweight, waterproof, and the colors are so pretty!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 가볍고 방수되고 색감도 너무 이쁘네요
reviews.content_en: It's lightweight, waterproof, and the colors are so pretty!

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 일단 색감 미쳣따리..너무 편해요..산책이 훨씬 수월해져서 좋았어요..저희강아지 이제 135일차..아직 산책 많이 서툴지만..무럭무럭 열심히 성장할듯!
reviews.content_en: The colors are absolutely amazing!! 😍 It's so convenient... walks are so much easier now! Our pup is 135 days old now.. still a bit clumsy with walks, but growing steadily!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
비숑이라 털이 쪄서 목이 두꺼운 편인데 사이즈는 좋네요 4키로 아이한테는 좀 투박한 느낌이네요~
리드줄을 먼저 사서 올 여름 비 올때 잘 사용해서 목줄도 구입했어요~~^^
reviews.content_en: Our Bichon has thick fur so the neck area is naturally thicker, but the size fits well! 🐕 The fit is a bit bulky on my 4kg pup though~ We got the leash first and used it well during the rainy season this summer, so we decided to get the collar too~~^^

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
장마때마다 잘 쓰던건데 전에 쓰던게
버클이 부러져서 구입했어요!! 전에껀 얇았는데 이번엔 두꺼워진건지 제가 사이즈를 큰걸 시킨건지 ㅎㅎ
색은 너무 예뻐요!
reviews.content_en: I've been using it well every rainy season, but the buckle on my old one broke so I bought a new one!! My old one was thinner, but this one seems thicker - or maybe I ordered a bigger size ㅎㅎ The color is so pretty though!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 예쁜 코랄 핑크인데 밤에 찍어서 오렌지 색(?)으로 보이네요! 11kg , 목둘레 48cm 프렌치불독 L 사이즈 잘 맞아요 ㅎㅎ 기존에 워터프루프 목줄도 잘 썼는데 넘 더러워져서 새로 샀어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's a pretty coral pink, but in the photo it looks more orange(?) 😅 11kg French Bulldog with 48cm neck circumference - size L fits perfectly ㅎㅎ I was already using the waterproof collar well before, but it got so dirty so I bought a new one ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
여름에 하네스는 더워서
방수되는 목줄로 선택했어요
목줄 생각보다 무게가 좀 나가는것 같지만 나름 만족합니당
reviews.content_en: A harness felt too hot for summer, so I chose the waterproof collar instead. The collar is a bit heavier than I expected, but I'm pretty satisfied with it!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
매번 사야지, 사야지 하면서 미루다가 이제서야 구매했습니다. 
왜 이제서야 구매를 했을까요!
바닥에 질질 끌려도 세탁 걱정이 없어서 너무 편합니다. 
세일 할 때 다른 컬러도 구매할걸 그랬어요.
reviews.content_en: I kept putting it off thinking I should buy it eventually, but I finally purchased it now. Why didn't I buy it sooner?! Even when it drags on the ground, there's no worry about washing it - so convenient. I should've bought other colors when there was a sale.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 핸즈프리라서 너무 편해요 !  조금 많이 더러워졌지만 .. 색이 예뻐요!! 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: It's hands-free so it's super convenient! 😊 It got a bit dirty, but.. the color is so pretty!! Thank you!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
배송도 빠르고 튼튼하고 좋아요 
방수되서 물놀이 할때도 잘써요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping, durable, and great! 👍 It's waterproof so it works well for water play too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 항상 잘 쓰고 있어요 비가오나 눈이오나 워터프루프라 진흙탕에 지렁이댄스 춰도 젖지않고 물티슈로 닦기만 해도 되니까 좋습니다^^...
reviews.content_en: I use it all the time and it's great! Whether it rains or snows, it's waterproof so even if my pup rolls around in muddy puddles and does the worm dance, it doesn't get wet, and I just need to wipe it with a wet cloth ^^

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
바잇미 첫구매 찬스로 샀는데
좋아요! 목둘레 고민하다 L 헸는데 좋아요!
아쿠아픽이라 편하고 끈이 길어서 제몸에 둘러서 산책하기 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I got lucky and bought BITE ME for the first time, and I love it! I was worried about the neck size and went with L - great choice! Since it's aqua pink it's convenient, and the long strap is perfect to wrap around myself for walks 🐾

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 색상도 귀엽고 리뉴얼되기 전에 리드줄은 먼저사버려서 목줄색이랑 다르지만 포인트되고 좋아요 수영하는갈 좋아해서 이번여름 기대됩니다
reviews.content_en: The color is so cute, and since I used up the leash before the renewal, it's a different color than the collar, but it works as a nice accent! My pup loves swimming, so I'm really looking forward to this summer 🏊

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: XO 워터프루프 목줄 사용중이다 버클이 부러져 뉴버전으로 재구매했습니다. 색감이 너무 예쁘고 바잇미 워터프루프 목줄 만한게 없어요!
reviews.content_en: I've been using the XO waterproof collar and the buckle broke, so I repurchased the new version. The color is so pretty, and there's nothing quite like BITE ME's waterproof collar!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 선물하려고 주문했어요.받아보니실물이진짜더이쁘네요.저희집애기꺼도주문해야겠어요.ㅎㅎ선물로주기만하면 안될꺼같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ordered this as a gift. When I received it, the actual product was even prettier than expected. Now I think I need to order one for my own pup too haha. I don't think I can just give it as a gift haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 선물하려고 주문했어요.받아보니실물이진짜더이쁘네요.저희집애기꺼도주문해야겠어요.ㅎㅎ선물로주기만하면 안될꺼같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ordered this as a gift. When I received it, the actual product was even prettier than expected. Now I think I need to order one for my own pup too haha. I don't think I can just give it as a gift haha

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 생각보다 무게가 나가지만 색감이뿌고 고리도 안정적이라 맘에 들어요! 10.8kg인 저희아이에겐 목줄이 좀 두껍나 싶긴하지만.. 괜찮은거 같아요!
reviews.content_en: It's heavier than I thought, but I love the color and the rings feel sturdy! For my 10.8kg pup, the collar seems a bit thick... but it seems fine!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송 받자마자 줄 바꿔 나왔어요 
줄이 젖지 않으니 찝찝하지 않고 편하네용
reviews.content_en: The leash came off right when I received it. Since the leash doesn't get wet, it doesn't feel damp and uncomfortable—it's really convenient!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 아직 사용을 못해봤어요 근데 목줄이 방수소재라 그런가 박음질 된 부분이 엄청 딱딱해서 목줄이 부드럽지는 않네요 색은 엄청 이뻐요!
reviews.content_en: I haven't used it yet, but since the collar is made of waterproof material, the stitched parts are really stiff and the leash isn't soft. The color is absolutely gorgeous though!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: ㅎㅎ 색상 이쁘다규 산책할때마다 어디꺼냐 물어보는거같아오
reviews.content_en: Haha the color is so pretty, people ask whose collar it is every time we go for a walk 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 항상 잘 쓰고 있어요 비가오나 눈이오나 워터프루프라 진흙탕에 지렁이댄스 춰도 젖지않고 물티슈로 닦기만 해도 되니까 좋습니다^^...
reviews.content_en: I'm always happy using it. Whether it rains or snows, it's waterproof so it doesn't get wet even after muddy walks and wiggling around, and I can just wipe it with a wet wipe—that's great! ^^

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
매년 여름 우중 산책하고 오면 리드줄 더러워지고 빨아도 얼룩 남았는데 
올여름엔 드디어 방수줄을 구매했습니다 핸즈프리라 좋고 생각보다 튼튼할거같네요 다만 바잇미 로고 찍힌 동그란부분이 끈적끈적거려서 닦았는데도 끈끈해요 쓰는데는 지장없을가같아 교환안해요
reviews.content_en: Every summer after rainy walks, the leash gets dirty and leaves stains even after washing, but this summer I finally bought a waterproof leash. It's great that it's hands-free and seems more durable than expected. The only thing is the round part with the BITE ME logo is sticky even after wiping, but since it doesn't affect use, I'm not exchanging it.

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 색상 너무~~~이쁘네요^^/
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty~~ 😊

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아요 이뻐요~~
reviews.content_en: I love it, it's so cute~~

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 정말 약해요! 원래 러프웨어 사용하는데 여름엔 방수줄이 필요해 색깔이 예뻐서 바잇미 구매했어요. 20키로 초반인데 목줄 잠금 두번 풀렸어요. 처음엔 잘못 착용해줬나? 하고 말았는데 두번째 풀렸을 때 겁나서 버렸고 나머지 하나는 잠그다 부러짐.. 횡단보도 앞이었음.. 줄은 무거운데 그렇다고 튼튼한거 같지 않아요. 강아지가 줄로 터그 하길 좋아해서 리드줄이 많은데 몇번 물고 씹었다고 이렇게 끊어진적은 처음이네여.. 다른분 글 보니까 똑같이 끊어졌네요..
reviews.content_en: It's really weak! I usually use Ruffwear, but I needed a waterproof leash for summer so I bought BITE ME because the color was pretty. My dog is just over 20kg and the leash clasp has come undone twice. At first I thought I didn't put it on correctly, but when it came undone the second time I got scared and threw it away, and the other one broke while I was fastening it... it was right before a crosswalk 😭 The line is heavy but it doesn't seem sturdy. My dog likes to play tug with the leash so I have many leads, but this is the first time one has snapped like this from a few bites and chews... Looking at other people's comments, it seems theirs snapped the same way...

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 무게가 좀 무겁기는 한데 그래도 방수여서 사용하기 좋을 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's a bit heavy, but since it's waterproof, it should be convenient to use.

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
비오는날 착용위해 구입했는데 생각보다 두꺼워요ㅠㅠ
지난번 다른브랜드M샀는데 작아서 다시구매했어요 사이즈여유있어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it to wear on rainy days, but it's thicker than I expected 😭 I bought a different brand M last time but it was too small so I repurchased this one. There's plenty of size room.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 이모네 시골개 더 이쁨 받으라고 이쁜 줄 찾던중 선택했습니다. 너무너무 만족합니다. 이쁨 받으며 산책도 하는 멋진 견생을 응원해주세요 ^^
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a pretty leash to make my aunt's country dog look even cuter, so I chose this. I'm so so satisfied. Let's cheer on my pup living a stylish life looking adorable on walks ^^ 🐕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
마땅히 좋은 줄을 못찾아서 세트로 세일할 때 구매했어요!
핸즈프리 리드줄을 찾다가 아주 좋게 겟 했어요!!
reviews.content_en: Couldn't find a good leash so I bought it on sale as a set! I found a hands-free lead that's really great!!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 어이쿠 색상 참 이쁜데 몸에 감아도 줄이 엄청 길어요 ㅠ  몸이 아주 거대하게 뚱뚱하거나 키가 많이 크거나 하면 모를까 저는(키163) 몸에 감아도 강아지가 저 멀리 가지 않는이상 줄이 땅에 질질 끌리네요. 그래서 한손으로 끈을 잡아야해요. 안그럼 강쥐 찾길까지 뻗어나갈듯요. 핸즈프리 산건데 그게 무의미해졌어요.  2미터 짜리가 있음 좋겠어요. 아마 저처럼 줄이 길다고 하신분들 많을거에요~
reviews.content_en: Oh the color is so pretty, but the leash is super long even when wrapped around me 😭 Unless I'm extremely overweight or very tall, even with it wrapped around me (I'm 163cm), the leash drags on the ground as long as my pup doesn't go too far away. So I have to hold the strap with one hand. Otherwise the pup would stretch out as if searching far and wide 😅 I bought this for hands-free use but that became pointless. I wish there was a 2-meter version. I think there are probably many people like me who find the leash too long~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
장마철에 쓰려고 구매했는데
평소에도 잘 써요
쨍 하니 눈에 잘 보여서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it for rainy season but I use it all the time. It's bright and easy to see, which is great!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 잘 쓰고 있어요 ! 편하게 사용할 수 있어서 좋아요~ 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: Using it well! It's convenient to use so I'm happy~ Thank you!
